highlights.description: Chicago Bulls vs. Orlando Magic: Game Highlights

tracking.trackingName: NBA_One-Play (Chicago Bulls vs. Orlando Magic: Game Highlights) 2025/10/25 ESHEET

headlines.description: — Josh Giddey had 21 points and eight rebounds, and the Chicago Bulls beat the Orlando Magic 110-98 on Saturday night for a 2-0 start.
headlines.shortLinkText: Bulls beat the cold-shooting Magic 110-98 for a 2-0 start

events.name: Oklahoma City Thunder at Atlanta Hawks

highlights.headline: Oklahoma City Thunder vs. Atlanta Hawks: Game Highlights
highlights.description: Oklahoma City Thunder vs. Atlanta Hawks: Game Highlights

tracking.trackingName: NBA_One-Play (Oklahoma City Thunder vs. Atlanta Hawks: Game Highlights) 2025/10/25 ESHEET

headlines.description: — Chet Holmgren scored 31 points, Shai Gilgeous-Alexander had 30 and the reigning NBA champion Oklahoma City Thunder pulled away in the second half for a 117-100 victory over the short-handed Atlanta Hawks on Saturday night.
headlines.shortLinkText: Holmgren scores 31 points, Gilgeous-Alexander has 30 to lead Oklahoma City past the Hawks 117-100

video.headline: Oklahoma City Thunder vs. Atlanta Hawks: Game Highlights

tracking.trackingName: NBA_One-Play (Oklahoma City Thunder vs. Atlanta Hawks: Game Highlights) 2025/10/25 ESHEET

highlights.headline: Charlotte Hornets vs. Philadelphia 76ers: Game Highlights
highlights.description: Charlotte Hornets vs. Philadelphia 76ers: Game Highlights

tracking.trackingName: NBA_One-Play (Charlotte Hornets vs. Philadelphia 76ers: Game Highlights) 2025/10/25 ESHEET

headlines.description: — Quentin Grimes snapped a tie with a 3-pointer with 14 seconds left and scored 24 points, and Tyrese Maxey scored 28 to lead the Philadelphia 76ers to a 125-121 win over the Charlotte Hornets on Saturday night.
headlines.shortLinkText: Quentin Grimes' clutch 3-pointer lifts 76ers to 125-121 win over Hornets in home opener

video.headline: Charlotte Hornets vs. Philadelphia 76ers: Game Highlights

tracking.trackingName: NBA_One-Play (Charlotte Hornets vs. Philadelphia 76ers: Game Highlights) 2025/10/25 ESHEET

highlights.headline: Indiana Pacers vs. Memphis Grizzlies: Game Highlights
highlights.description: Indiana Pacers vs. Memphis Grizzlies: Game Highlights

tracking.trackingName: NBA_One-Play (Indiana Pacers vs. Memphis Grizzlies: Game Highlights) 2025/10/26 ESHEET

headlines.description: — Rookie Cedric Coward scored 22 of his 27 points in the second half, and the Memphis Grizzlies pulled away for a 128-103 victory over the Indiana Pacers on Saturday night.
headlines.shortLinkText: Rookie Cedric Coward hits all 6 3-pointers and scores 27 points as Grizzlies beat Pacers 128-103

highlights.headline: Phoenix Suns vs. Denver Nuggets: Game Highlights
highlights.description: Phoenix Suns vs. Denver Nuggets: Game Highlights

tracking.trackingName: NBA_One-Play (Phoenix Suns vs. Denver Nuggets: Game Highlights) 2025/10/26 ESHEET

headlines.description: — Nikola Jokic had his second triple-double of the season despite a quiet shooting night, Jamal Murray scored 23 points, and the Denver Nuggets beat the Phoenix Suns 133-111 in their home opener on Saturday night.
headlines.shortLinkText: Jokic's triple-double lifts Nuggets over Suns 133-111

video.headline: Phoenix Suns vs. Denver Nuggets: Game Highlights
